semantic_text: Delete package.json
Update frontend test and snapshot

Edit Filter Drawer functionality:

- Added route based conditional rendering for the Filter Drawer Toggle.
- Added user level based rendering of Search Organizations autocomplete label.
- Began extending autocompletedResults and autocompletedSuggestions from Search Context to the Domain/IP Search Bar.
  - Nothing is returning yet, but these values should improve the user experience once we get them returned from ElasticSearch.
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/develop' into 2560-improve-user-tracking

Edit Filter Drawer functionality

- Added FilterDrawerToggle component to handle the toggle functionality of the filter drawer.
- Built Autocomplete component for regions.
- Refactored FilterDrawerV2 in the following ways:
  - Domain/IP search only appears when the filter drawer is used in "/inventory" route.
  - Checkbox controlled lists are user level dependent:
    - Global Admins possess lists for both Regions and Organizations.
    - Regional Admins possess a list for Regions only.
    - Standard Users possess no lists.
- Disabled props are user level dependent:
  - Global Admin:
    - Regions - enabled.
    - Organizations - enabled.
  - Regional Admins:
    - Regions - disabled.
    - Organizations - enabled.
  - Standard Users:
    - Regions - disabled.
    - Organizations - disabled.
- Text field labels are user level dependent:
  - Global Admin:
    - Regions - "Select Region(s)".
    - Organizations - "Select Organization(s)".
  - Regional Admins:
    - Regions - User's Region ID.
    - Organizations - "Select Organization(s)".
  - Standard Users:
    - Regions - User's Region ID.
    - Organizations - User's Organization.
- Cleaned up code.
Added state and maintenance checks

Edit to utilize new clipped FilterDrawerV2

- Refactored Layout DOM and CSS to prevent scroll bounce.
  - overFlow: auto, overScrollBehavior: contain.
- Reenabled mobile temporary variant for FilterDrawerV2.
- Added height: 100vh to parent divs in Domains, Users, VulnerabilityScan, and Vulnerabilities pages to prevent scroll bounce.
- Banner scrolls away but Header stays fixed.
  - No bounce.
- Filter Drawer now remains fixed under the Header.
- Added definedd zIndex of FilterDrawerV2 to Theme.
- Set zIndex of Header and GovBanner to FilterDrawerV2 zIndex + 1.
  - Drawer now sits under Header and GovBanner.
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/VS-Dashboard-Develop' into Filter-Drawer-CRASM-2530
Modified Datagrid within Users.tsx to display Approved By field properly; Adjusted date/time display for Approval Date
Delete package.json
json reversions
Removed debugging statements

Edit FilterDrawerV2.tsx and Risk/style.ts

- refactored sx props for Drawer and MUIDrawer-paper class.
- refactored css for root and content classes in Risk/style.ts

Reconcile default user state

- Attempting to implement consistent filters across Overview,
  Vulnerability Scan, and Inventory pages.
- Global Admin and Regional Admin have multi select filters in Overview and Inventory but that backend functionality does not exist for Vulnerability Scan.
- Implemented logic to reduce filter value length to single index when entering Vulnerability Scan page.
- Needs polish.

  - Domain/IP search only appears when the filter drawer is used in "/inventory" route.
  - Checkbox controlled lists are user level dependent:
    - Global Admins possess lists for both Regions and Organizations.
    - Regional Admins possess a list for Regions only.
    - Standard Users possess no lists.
- Disabled props are user level dependent:
  - Global Admin:

    - Organizations - enabled.
  - Regional Admins:

    - Organizations - enabled.
  - Standard Users:

- Text field labels are user level dependent:
  - Global Admin:

    - Organizations - "Select Organization(s)".
  - Regional Admins:
    - Regions - User's Region ID.
    - Organizations - "Select Organization(s)".
  - Standard Users:
